title: PushSubscriptionSetResponse.created values are serde_json::Value: id field inaccessible
description: The created map value is serde_json::Value. The primary thing callers want after creating a PushSubscription is the server-assigned id (to store for later update/destroy). Callers must do created["client-key"]["id"].as_str() with no type safety. Every caller will write the same ad-hoc extraction. A typed struct { id: String, expires: Option<UTCDate> } would make this public API self-describing. This is the top-level return type of a public method — it will fossilize immediately.
close_reason: design decision: consistent with all other SetResponse created maps; id accessible via serde_json Value
